---
title: "Measuring the Dollar Value of Machine Translation"
description: "U.S. eBay exports to Spanish-speaking Latin America rose more than 17% after MT was deployed."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-09-28"
categories: [NLP, multilingual, paper, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Measuring the dollar value of MT. Image from [NBER](https://www.nber.org/papers/w24917).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Measuring dollar value of breaking language barriers: "After implementation [of MT], U.S. exports via eBay to Spanish-speaking Latin American countries increased by more than 17 percent."


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_national-bureau-of-economic-research-activity-6716178289607741440-nYua).*
